channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: BLACK MONDAY — 86 replies — 344.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
BLACK MONDAY

Open thread • Replies: 86 • Updated: 2026-03-22 22:28 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62015793
How do you deescalate if you bomb their water and energy plants?

62015796
>>62015789

62015797
>>62015793
You don't, it's pretty clear that they (Israel) want to collapse the state and create Syria 2.0

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62016822
>>62015797
Easy enough. War is an effective way to topple a government, and that's exactly what Israel wants to do. There is no pretense that we are installing democracy or something silly like that. Anarchy is fine so long as they aren't a threat.

62016847
>>62016721
They accept them insofar as they tolerate them being a tiny powerless minority in Muslim countries. They fundamentally reject Israel as a Jewish state and vow to destroy it.

62016863
>>62016822
This is basically it. Bomb all the infrastructure and embargo all supplies. Isreal and the US administration both love the idea of Iran further chimping out because they want escalation--any excuse to turn the country into a post apocalyptic wasteland where ethnic militias fight IRGC fanatic remnants over who gets to cannabilize the civilian population. US/Isreal will start with the electric grid, which is very complex in Iran and surprisingly well put together. Iran continues to destroy Gulf oil infrastructure. US seizes some islands and bombs Iranian oilfields in response. Iran retaliates with strikes on higher-value targets--maybe an attempt to hit Isreali nuclear plants or legitimately making an effort to mine the Strait for good, or hitting desalination plants.

62016902
>>62015789

62016911
>>62016744
What part of VAT affecting everything, domestic or foreign, is too hard to understand?

62016914
>>62016130
you realize nothing ever happens and we are just larping and shitposting right?

62016916
>>62016174
Hahahaha

62016932
Monday green btw
Ceasfire by end of march
Exit accordingly

62016940
>>62015889
Crypto crashes when people need liquidity, just like stocks except worse.

62017237
>>62015789
Nooo I already closed most of my puts for the Monday bounce. We need to bounce back so I can open new shorts!!

62017270
>>62015793
>deescalate
You are in for a big surprise

62017281
>>62016130
Kek everything you posted is bullish af. Everyone is despondent and we are going higher.

62017288
>>62017270
>huWHY are they framing it as a religious war??
if only they listened

62017508
>>62016863
This is no fun unless there is a credible threat of Nukes.

62017543
>>62017508
Here you go

62017550
>>62016764

You won't do shit and neither will any of the hill billies in the back water, faggot. Remember that time the shut down the churches for 2 years. Remember how nobody did shit? Stop lying to yourself.

62017563
>>62015789
Why the fuck did I listen to boomer bogleheads and put most of my money in the market. It would have been better off in a savings account.

62017589
>>62017543
Iran is really going and tryina get nuked

62017608
>>62015789
fingers crossed for escalation.

62017610
>>62017563
i know that feel bro

62017615
>>62017543
This fucking nigger is going to nuke Iran for the fucking kikes. Holy shit he's really going to do it.

62017625
>>62017543
fake

62017643
>>62015789
Hi guys. My dad works in Hormuse strait. He just called me all nervous and told me that it will be closed for years. Then he said something like all snack bar said I have to sell my mustang and get a used prius, called me a faggot and said it's over. What do.

62017704
>>62015913
China, Russia, and DPRK are not giving the Iranians anywhere near the support they gave Vietnam.

62017716
>>62017704

We're only 3 weeks in.

62017721
>>62016531
Im gonna need a works cited page

62017738
>>62017716
I didn't see any Iranian volunteers in Kursk.

62017817
>>62017615
I wish

62017823
>>62017550
>the shut down the churches for 2 years
Not in my locale they didn’t. Maybe in shitskin land.

item.title: >MFW BURGERS HAVE TO RATION THEIR GAS SINCE THEIR ENTIRE SOCIETY IN DEPENDENT ON CARS — 50 replies — 200.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>MFW BURGERS HAVE TO RATION THEIR GAS SINCE THEIR ENTIRE SOCIETY IN DEPENDENT ON CARS

Open thread • Replies: 50 • Updated: 2026-03-22 22:26 UTC

OP

>MFW BURGERS HAVE TO RATION THEIR GAS SINCE THEIR ENTIRE SOCIETY IN DEPENDENT ON CARS

Early replies (first 3)

62011346
This kills the burger

62011349
$5 for gas where I am at. Probably going to get worse. Feels fucking bad man

62011356
>>62011349
7.50 dollars a gallon where I'm at, and after tip it's closer to 9.50.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62011672
>They don't use E85
Still at 2.99 a gallon here, lol, lmao even

62011684
>>62011291
tbf that is being tossed around at the moment here in the uk too
The pm said rationing will be needed if the shortage continues

62011710
>Better hope your door handles work in an emergen-AAAAAAAAAACK

62011722
Let the Oilyim deal with the real world.

62012163
you retards are posting in a 1pbtid thread

also gas is only $3.29-$3.49 where I live.

62014653
>>62012163
?

62014667
>>62011349
>>62011356
>living in commie states
>pay more for basic commodities
Poetry in motion. Death to Iran.

62014711
>>62014667
You can't do shit to Iran, Goldberg. Go dodge a rocket

62014755
>>62011291
are you mental, USA produces all the gas it needs

62014757
>>62011356
$9.27/gallon in my US state, not sure how im gonna make rent this month

62015052
>>62011291
Cars are awesome!! Set my own temperature. Select my own music. Adjust my seat just how I like it. Don't have to smell other people's farts and BO. Nobody stabs me. Drive right to where I want to go. Can take road trips into the mountains. Can even sleep in my car in an emergency.

62015057
>>62015052
>Nobody stabs me.
Except your steering wheel when a karen driving her landbarge SUV t-bones you while she's playing candy crush

62015073
>>62011291
>brags about being rich country
>absolute obese mutts everywhere
>walk across the street is literally illegal

62015074
>>62015052
I'm European so I bike to work for free

62015115
>>62015074
Like thats any better than public transport.
Being out in the elements, being sweaty, getting sundamage to your skin from all the UV exposure.

62015129
Spent 70 bucks to fill my truck.
Worth it.
I voted for this.

62017431
>>62015129
>iToddler saving an iFunny meme

62017439
>>62011349
>>62011356
>>62011360
HAHAHAHAHAHA!!!!!!

$3.29 where I live. LOSERS!!!

62017466
>>62015115
I'm sorry that a little sweat, sun, and rain is such a hardship for your delicate skin

62017470
>>62011654
A BYD car in Israel survived a missile strike. All passengers survived, and the car did not even catch on fire

62017481
>>62015052
People don't get stabbed on public transport in europe.

62017502
>>62011291
All that's going to happen is a major recession and Republicans getting completely wiped out in November. Perhaps to never recover again, though I wouldn't bet on it

62017505
>>62015074
>having to ride a bike when you can listen to whatever music you like blazing loud (aftermarket stereo in my car, expensive but worth it)
>not at direct risk of niggers/arabs attacking me, secret wpns in my car when needed
>perfect weather control
>fragrant cuz of air fresheners
look, its nice you're getting exercise, but its hot where i live, and i don't want to smell in the workplace. Cars are unfathomably based.

62017509
>>62017470
its important that the batteries don't get breached, this is a scenario where the batteries being on the bottom of the car helped alot i guess.

That being said, even a fragment of a land mine hitting an EV=quick death.

62017511
>>62011291
Water you on about? Gas is still like a considerably cheaper than when Sleepy Joe was in office. It's really not that expensive at all.

62017512
having your entire country rely on commodity prices is 3rd world shit. America is a 3rd world country. If gas prices go up their entire economy folds like a cart house

62017518
>>62017512
Then why does the rest of the world crash every time we do?

62017618
>>62017518
2008 was way milder in europe.

62017761
>>62011380
this will break half of america plus everything else will tick up oil <60/b really makes you wonder why inflation wasnt squashed its the interest rates

62017814
>>62011404
I have an electric bmw, but I only drive like once a week because I live in a neighborhood where I can walk everywhere and I’m constantly high or drunk lol

item.title: >online dating is the future of lo-ACK! — 19 replies — 76.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>online dating is the future of lo-ACK!

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-03-22 22:22 UTC

OP

>online dating is the future of lo-ACK!

Early replies (first 3)

62017513
>>62017496
We already had this thread. Bumble is merely a lesson in why women are retarded.

62017539
Its was just a way to spread stds to a control group of retards

62017623
>>62017496
Are these dating apps even useable on the free tiers? Any time I install one of these you literally cannot do anything unless you pay them some absurd monthly fee like $29 a month. Who actually pays for this crap?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62017652
haha yes who would pay for a dating app! that would be so pathetic...

62017656
Back when there was no paywall and no algorithm optimization. These apps were cool. You could fuck above average, low self esteem 18 year olds on demand.

62017676
>>62017656
So then how am I supposed to find low self esteem 18 years olds for sex now?

62017681
>>62017676
Buy a Ferrari and hang out next to your local college

62017698
>>62017681
Any other nuanced details I should know about?
I'm autistic if that matters, like actual mental disability but not fully retarded kind of autism. Mainly struggles with social situations and in person communication.

62017702
>>62017652
Tinder platinum is the best way to get pussy right now. I say this as someone who went to bars before tinder became mainstream. You can get three beers in a bar these days for the same price as platinum costs for a month and you can get hot pussy from anywhere at any time.

62017710
>>62017623
indians and other non-whites

62017719
>>62017698
Retardmax and cold approach girls with no fear of rejection. You'll get rejected almost everytime but you'll learn.

62017722
>>62017698
>autistic fuck didn't know I was joking
there's no hope for you

62017733
>>62017702
kys chad

62017743
>>62017496
Online dating is still the meta for getting women it has always been done via non official dating apps, social media like instagram for example is how people date online.

>>62017698
> I'm autistic if that matters, like actual mental disability but not fully retarded kind of autism. Mainly struggles with social situations and in person communication.
You are absolutely fucked then even if giga rich with a Ferrari. Best you can hope for is Asian girls as Asian women are less judgmental of autistic traits.

62017749
>>62017733
You too can become a doctor and make a killer profile.

62017755
>>62017623
They aren't even usable on the most premium tiers lol

62017765
>>62017749
>is a doctor
>isnt married
>obsessed with defiling 18 year old pussy
the gods will be sending you to a terrible place, you know that right?

62017783
>>62017710
What is that supposed to mean?

62017797
Good, fucking die you Jewish piece of shit

item.title: I SUFFER IN CALIFORNIA — 44 replies — 68.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
I SUFFER IN CALIFORNIA

Open thread • Replies: 44 • Updated: 2026-03-22 21:54 UTC

OP

FUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU-

Early replies (first 3)

62017018
>>62017002
Why does it tend to be more expensive there

62017023
>>62017018
Same reason cigarettes are expensive there. Sin taxes.

62017024
>>62017018
because commie trannies like to tax everything. It should be the cheapest in california. Good thing is that its mostly shitskins in calfornia now so not my problem. Let the spics and asians pay the high prices.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62017218
>>62017018
It’s the most corrupt poorly run state in the country. They don’t even have water to put out fires. Everything is taxed to hell.

62017219
>>62017208
>White liberals in America
That's Trump.

62017274
I’m plundering the state and will buy so much etherium

62017285
>>62017218
Everything is taxed to hell in europe too but we have the highest average living quality on the planet.

62017301
>>62017002
>prices are double where wages are double
wew lad

62017311
>>62017218
which is wild considering there's an ocean right there

62017318
>>62017002
is that lax angelexico

62017321
>he didn't buy a tesla

ya blew it you fucking moron.

62017326
part of its the taxes, the other part is all the gas truck drivers are mexican gas thiefs

62017378
>>62017301
>he thinks L.A. isn't 14 million illiterate broke Mexicans serving 1 million wealthy jews like slaves.

62017379
>Chevron
They have higher prices to keep out the riff raff.

62017385
>>62017024
Just cool it with antisemitism, anon.

62017395
>>62017379
gas station riff raff is there to pan handle and skim cards...that's preferable

62017410
first eggs, now gas. get it together, donald

62017411
>>62017028
>It's $3.60 in Texas
was $3.29 today in Iowa

62017422
>>62017002
have you tried rollerblading?

62017429
>>62017410
gasoline has sulphur in it, solution: drink gasoline?

62017435
>>62017311
taking salt out of salt water is extremely expensive

62017443
>>62017435
Why does that matter for firefighting?

62017453
>>62017443
I bet the firefighters are obligated to buy water from that boomer couple who owns half of calis water

62017454
>>62017429
electricity has electrolytes. and its available in every room.

62017456
>>62017018
The pictures you keep seeing are from two very infamous gas stations in Los Angeles that are hit with extra taxes and also have to have a special blend of oil in order to meet regulations.
If it was for stupid taxes gas would basically be the same as anywhere else in the US
I got gas a few days ago and paid $5.25
>>62017378
>1 million jews in los angeles
There are 1.232 million jews in all of California with a little under half in LA county
Only 9.76 million people in LA county too btw but those are just official numbers

62017463
>>62017454
combine both for maximum effect

62017475
>>62017199
Because they priced in fear, so....viola!

62017477
>>62017002

62017482
>>62017199
Agenda 2030 demands a fuel price of 20$ a gallon. Not joking. Look into it.

62017538
>>62017443
Ever heard of the phrase “salting the earth”

62017617
>>62017002
Just buy a Tesla like a normal person

62017620
>>62017002
I wonder if they get rid of that 9/10 part when the price goes over $10 and they need more room on the sign.

62017621

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 96 replies — 28.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 96 • Updated: 2026-03-22 19:12 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61995431
The golden bull run might have just started. How are we feeling?

61995436
>>61995431
good when return @ 6$

61996036
>>61993232
Can't expect a massive inflow like BTC. Had a decent pump already.

The technicals look stable. Advice. Jump in now while you can

61997405
100$ end of bull run

61997626
Just bought in, life savings. When does it hit $10?

61998660
>>61932834

This shit is going to 100 dollars isnt it

61998672
>>61997626
Oh shit anon. We should've told you that if YOU buy then it's going to 0$. You should sell and then after you sell we'll GIGA ULTRA MEGA PUMP to 100$+

61998866
>>61998660
Yes. Yes it is

61999089
>>61998866
Did you buy?

62000247
>>61999089
Of course. 100 DOT holder reporting in

62000433
>>62000247
It's over guys. This guy doomed us. Because he bought it's going to 0$. Please sell before I put my DOT into my cars brakes.

62004150
>>62000247
The moment you bough the whole market started dumping.

62007000
100$ end of bull run. Is it possible to keep the thread alive for 1 full month? 15 days to go!

62007009
How much are they paying you jeets to post here?

62007046
>>62007009
Well... The question is... How much do you want to get paid to jeet like we do? We can easily mog your jobs salary. JEETMAXXING

62007254
>>62007009
Zero. Plus im white

62008295
>>62007254
Good one dear fren Rajakesh Pujakistan. That'll convince him. Now post your white hand with a timestamp. Picrel is me and my white hand sar

62010139
So... When's JAM coming out guys? Those fuckers stopped doing the monthly development calls

62010191
>>62010139
If you're not a bot, here's a question: why constantly humiliate yourself in public like this? It's embarrassing. Nobody cares about the pedochain and Gayvin.

62010262
>>62010191
I'm really glad you brought that up anon. Great question! And if I want to answer it properly, like you deserve, my good sar, then I'll need a bit more information
>why constantly humiliate yourself in public like this? It's embarrassing. Nobody cares about the pedochain and Gayvin.
What do you mean by constantly humiliate myself? Can you help me understand that

62011878
100$ end of bull run

62014468
You did notice that the activity is actually up by a large % since Acurast launched their corechains (https://data.parity.io/parachain-stats?selection-mode=include&frequency=daily), right guys?

62014587
>>62010191
False rumor about Gavin

62015928
>>62014587
Don't lie. Why do you think they call him WOOD? And he literally looks like a 7yo boy pedo, just look at him. If I googled "Pedophile" then Gavins picture would probably be #2, right after Epstein. And since we're talking about Epstein... Gavin and Epstein were partying all the time together.

62016012
>>62015928
Oh shit. You are a bot

62016043
>>62016012
Could a bot post pictures of his hands with a timestamp? Like I did here; >>62008295 ??? Makes no sense, right?

62016887
>>62016043
So are you for DOT or not

62016901
>>62016887
What do you mean by FOR? Could you define that a little bit more?

62016960
>>61932834
How does a thread with only 94 posts from 20 days ago exist? Dot fag must be bumping it everyday when it hits page 10.

62016999
>>62016960
Read this >>62007000
Also. This is now a DOT board. /biz/ was always a DOT board

item.title: >world go bad gold must always go up >WTF WHY GOLD NO GO UP?!??! — 60 replies — 28.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
>world go bad gold must always go up >WTF WHY GOLD NO GO UP?!??!

Open thread • Replies: 60 • Updated: 2026-03-22 20:25 UTC

OP

>world go bad gold must always go up
>WTF WHY GOLD NO GO UP?!??!
Is the most brain dead retarded take imaginable. These retards fail to understand the price of gold is also linked to it's industrial use.

Early replies (first 3)

62006969
>>62006961
These are the same type of people who bought gamestop btw.

62006976
>>62006969
digits... checked

62006979
>>62006961
Probably a horde of cunts started leveraging themselves long up the ass when the war started.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62009821
>>62009589
yeah, before the 1700s, gold was priced at zero because it wasn't use industrially, we all know that!

62011236
>>62006961
It's time to buy,

62011262
Don't zoom out guys its over this is the all time peak for gold

62011311
The obvious answer which nobody is mentioning is that the gold price is being lowered to give banks an opportunity to reacquire physical assets instead of paper assets, in preparation so they don't get margin called, audited, etc. when the inevitable drop happens.

62011335
>>62006961
reminder even the top assets in world can/are easily rugpulled like crypto

62011402
>>62006961
This literally always happens at the beginning of a financial crisis where gold skyrockets. It's because people are retarded and dump their gold to cover their margin calls.
Gold $6000 EOY*
Silver $150 EOY*
Screenshot this.
*at least

62011417
>>62006961
>These retards fail to understand the price of gold is also linked to it's industrial use
lol
gold is saudi's money, they sell oil and buy gold, price go up, when they can't sell oil, they sell gold, price go down

62011427
>>62011335
Anon....
Tell me....

One year ago?

What was Gold and Silver prices?

62011496
what's a good site to buy physical gold/silver?

62011664
>>62011496
>>>/biz/pmg

62012196
>>62006961
>hedge against political instability
What? No, it is a hedge against inflation and currency debasement at best. A physical asset is terrible for hedging against political instability. How do you move it out of a warzone? How about out of a repressive regime?
Retard

62012210
>>62012196
CNBC claims that inflation is what is driving prices lower though.

62012310
>>62012196
Stick a gold coin up your ass. If you stick up 60 silver coins you are a tremendous faggot.

62012611
>>62012210
CNBC are disingenuous and intentionally ignore how the political instability and the need unwind leverage are the reason gold is being sold.

62012673
>>62006961
>cash out all your gold
>yolo into oil
It's retarded but it works. They're probably overleveraged to shit on paper trades

62015367
Orange Man Bad about to turn off Iran's lights
BTC shits the bed like gold did
>the only real inflation hedge has always been bullets after all

62015386
>>62006961
I bought back in 2023. I'm not worried

62015392
>>62006961
gold drops when people know there wont be a rebuilding phase after an apocalypse

62015545
>>62006961
No. I will never buy your useless rocks, retard.

62015709
Price is malleable. Supply is not.

62015716
>>62006961
It doesn’t have to go up.all they have to do is make it unobtainable for normies.
Most normies can barely afford to fill their gas tanks or spend close to as much as the use to a year ago.what make you think they could afford to buy a shiny rock at current prices?

62015768
it's arabs selling their gold because they need cash since they can't reliably sell their oil

62015770
>>62007829
>Anon is jealous of
>>62006969
>Digits

62015784
>>62006961
Because when shtf people sell gold first to pay to have it cleaned up.

62016992
>>62006961
Gold is up 4% YTD. In the next two years we will see >7000$ Gold. Inflation and the decline of the World Reserve currency just started

62017010
>>62006961
>why is a shiny rock with no use case crashing?!
Truly a mystery.

62017033
>>62006961
When it hits six hundred dollars again I am buying and hodling

62017090
>>62006961
>the price of gold is also linked to it's industrial use.
which has almost no weight to the actual price

62017143
>>62006990
Give it a minute, wait until WW3 before selling.

62017279
>>62007712
I look like this actually

item.title: USA is removing sanctions on Iranian oil — 63 replies — 23.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
USA is removing sanctions on Iranian oil

Open thread • Replies: 63 • Updated: 2026-03-22 19:51 UTC

OP

This is going to crash the oil market!!!

Early replies (first 3)

62005086
>>62005061
based bussyent

62005090
>>62005061
stupid, they should be forced to sell it to us for $$30 a barrel.

62005101
The message is that they fucked it up so hard they're begging the enemy they want to destroy to sell them OIL lmfao. Sure, faggot, what about a tariff for Amerimutts plus you pay in yuan, sodomite.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62012504
This reeks of sheer desperation.

62012787
>>62012471
This is some grade-A quality schizo theory and I love it.

62012801
>>62005061
this is meaningless rhetoric and I'm tired of this blatantly bullshit market manipulation every fucking week
the oil was only sanctioned to NATOcucks and Iran got their money in Chinese bank accounts which orange niggers couldn't touch even if he rimmed Netanyahu on an emergency broadcast
no NATOcuck country is going to touch Iranian oil and it will still flow to China so what he's saying is essentially "uhh don't worry guys we won't blow their oil up we know how fucked up things are" which is like NO FUCKING SHIT
I'm so fucking tired of this retarded nigger administration

62013223
>>62005061
Hahahaha these fucking clowns

62013268
I still think nothing ever happens and it'll be okay but Iran and their backers have the once in a generation opportunity to really kick america HARD in the balls

It remains to be seen whether they will want to take it

62013281
>>62005061
it happened yesterday OFAC lifted the restriction through an announcment on their site

62013287
>>62012498
That's not going to bring the oil back

62013304
>>62005061
They are just scared of China involving itself in the war using Iran as a proxy.

62013322
>>62005061
hmmm
maybe they're preparing for taking that island and using that oil

62013373
>>62005061
The goals of the war in iran:
1) Help russia by making oil expensive
2) hurt europe and usa

62013850
>>62012471
This is just fucking dumb and stupid. You'd have to be retarded to believe this is all true.

62013878
>>62012292
what does venezuela need to fix? globocorp can build the infrastructure, and the mcdonalds or amazon private army can be contracted to defend it - or the nypd

62013905
>>62005101
They're not saying they're going to buy it I don't think. They're just not going to put sanctions on other countries for buying it.

62013971
>>62012471
we need to ban aislop posters

62013977
>>62013878
oh yeah, globocorp will rebuild the infra in 2 weeks, and they will do so just because orange man told them "we control their oil!", as if that meant the US will keep control of their oil forever (or for at least 2 more weeks until the next latin american caudillo comes, nationalizes the oil and tells the US to fuck off and die)

62014076
>>62013304
>Its a proxy war between Israel and China, with USA and Iran as the proxies.
I wouldnt have imagined this in 2025

62015085
>>62005061
how come they want to kill the population? they told us the bombs would help the iranian people defeat the regime

62015596
>>62012261
The whole reason why Trump went to politics is because he started seething when europeans told him on twitter how they have higher living quality than americans despite not worshipping billionaires like him. The american elite know thst europe is everything.

62016207
>>62015596
>The whole reason why Trump went to politics is because he started seething when europeans told him on twitter how they have higher living quality than americans despite not worshipping billionaires like him
HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA
imagine believing this bullshit.
he went to politics becausehe wanted power, and his israeli handlers know americans are retarded.

62016440
>>62005061
>140 million barrels on water
May we see them?

62016447
>>62016440
Kharg Island has storage tanks filled with oil

62016458
>>62016447
He said on water. Show the tankers. It should be easy because one tanker can lift maybe 1 million barrels so there must a whole fleet of Iranian tankers somewhere in that bay.

62016464
>>62016458
You do know Iran has increased oil exports since the war and are regularly exporting oil to China and have free passage through the strait, right? They've increased oil exports by 100,000 barrels a day since this all started

62016476
>>62016458
>Iran has still managed to export well above 16 million barrels of oil since the beginning of March, trade data and analytics platform Kpler estimated. Due to Western sanctions and associated risks, China has been the biggest buyer of Iranian oil.

>At least 89 ships crossed the Strait of Hormuz between March 1 and 15 – including 16 oil tankers, according to Lloyd's List Intelligence, down from roughly 100 to 135 vessel passages per day before the war. More than one-fifth of the 89 vessels were believed to be Iran-affiliated, while Chinese and Greece affiliated ships are among the rest, it said.

https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/iran-continues-exporting-millions-of-barrels-of-oil-as-around-90-ships-cross-the-strait-of-hormuz-despite-the-war

62016482
>>62016458
>>62016464
>>62016476
>Marine tracking data indicates Iranian-linked oil tankers are using fake location information to help them avoid detection as they move sanctioned cargo through the Strait of Hormuz.

>Oil shipment organisation TankerTrackers said this week that up to 2 million barrels of Iranian crude oil were loaded on tankers at Kharg Island in the Strait on March 13.

>Analysts at trade data and analytics company Kpler estimated Iran had been able to export 12 million barrels between February 28 and March 12.

62016524
>>62016476
Even if it's true. That's still nowhere near 140 million barrels lol.

62016535
>>62016524
That's what they've currently exported you retard, they have the 140 million barrels of oil in storage tanks on Kharg Island from where they transfer it to the oil tankers at sea

62016544
>>62005206
All I can say is strap in, this year and next will be non-stop "2 more weeks until we totally removed the Iranian regime" copes from these faggots. The chinks will be laughing every day.

62016619
>>62016535
Yeah yeah two more Drampgh shit posts and gas will be cheaper than when Biden was a president. Learn your bus schedule because with oil hitting 250 you will need it to get to your wage cage.

62017163
wow /biz/ is so emotional no wonder youre all poorfags

item.title: When is this Orange Nigga going to TACO? — 14 replies — 23.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
When is this Orange Nigga going to TACO?

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-03-22 21:56 UTC

OP

When is this Orange Nigga going to TACO? Tomorrow after the market closes?

Early replies (first 3)

62017486
>>62017479
Tomorrow. He set a 48 hour deadline on Saturday. He will declare that we've won, and the Straits are completely open now that Iran's military, air force, and navy have been totally obliterared (even though they're not)

62017490
March 31st just before the month ends

62017506
>>62017486
I'm not so sure about that this time. He could TACO on tariffs because he had sole control over that power. This time, he boxed himself into a 48 hour ultimatum where he has to start bombing Iran's infrastructure because they won't give up the strait since it is their main leverage tool. In other words, he can't TACO, because he doesn't have the power to this time.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62017527
>>62017506
He will TACO. The script will go something like this:
>well I gave Iran 48 hours notice.. we didn't get a response because we killed so many of them, there is no one left to respond *laughs*
> my little excursion was an overwhelming success. Iran has been totally obliterated, they have no missiles, no navy, no air force. The Strait of Hormuz is completely open to countries who need to use it. They can send their navy in to secure the Strait if they're so worried.

62017553
>>62017527
So why give the 48 hour ultimatum if he's not even going to attempt to bomb anything to save face? He could do what you said, but the strait would remain closed, which would destroy the world economy and he will get obliterated in the midterms. I think he's going to do something because he thinks he has to.

62017568
>>62017553
There is nothing he can do. Any escalation keeps the Strait closed for longer. If he leaves now, Iran will open the Strait back up and charge ships a fee for going through. Not the end of the world.
Why the 48 hours? Trump is a showbiz/hollywood type of guy. I think he wants everyone to be holding their breath and then breathe out a sigh of relief when he TACOs. It makes it seem like it's his decision.

62017580
>>62017568
>Trump the goodest goy is going to leave Israel to be heemed into rubble

62017592
>>62017580
He has no other option, first and foremost.
Israel did all this planning and strategy with him on the first strikes. They convinced him regime change was going to work. It didn't. In Trump's mind, it's their fault (and it is).

62017593
>>62017568
>There is nothing he can do
Trump doesn't know that. That's why he assassinated their supreme leader thinking he could pick a new one. Iran won't open the strait back up if he leaves unless they get concessions and security guarantees because they know better this time and it is their only leverage.

62017595
>>62017592
Bibi has his child porn videos you fucking irredeemable moron.

62017606
>>62017592
How was it Israel's fault that they duped their retarded shabbos goy into joining them in starting a war? Trump shares the blame for allowing himself to be owned so completely by the jews. He is the commander-in-chief. The buck stops there.

62017611
>>62017593
>>62017595
You both assume Trump is stupid or compromised. I don't. He took a chance on this regime change strike, it didn't work, now he is extracting himself after considering all other options. It is Israel's fault, their intelligence told him it would work and they fucked it up.

62017628
>>62017611
You said it yourself, he is compromised by the kikes for listening to their intelligence and starting a war from it. He didn't have to do shit.

62017636
>>62017611
the point is that it doesn't matter if he backs off or not. they aren't going to open the strait until they receive tangible concessions. so it's either that or an escalation of the conflict. either way it's not going to open any time soon

item.title: HOW TO SAVE MONEY — 41 replies — 22.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
HOW TO SAVE MONEY

Open thread • Replies: 41 • Updated: 2026-03-22 20:45 UTC

OP

Euro here, I commute to work 2km on a bicycle. Never driven a car. I saved a fortune, missed some fun. Inflation is still gonna hit, but at least I dodged that massive bullet.

What do you do to save money?

Early replies (first 3)

62015679
>>62015674
Faggot

62015686
>>62015674
I am going by bus. Same. Time since the city is undrivable at the mornings and. Much cheaper.

62015687
>>62015686
Bus+metro

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62015756
>>62015674
>What do you do to save money?
No subscriptions, no netflix, no cable tv.
No debt, no interest payments.
Live in my own house and pay no rent (large downpayment, paid down the small mortgage within 5 years)
Drive an old car, have never bought a new car, always buy used (with cash) and keep it for a long time.
Rarely go to restaurants or bars, mostly cook at home with fresh and healthy ingredients.
Do not order stupid shit online. Never order food delivery.

62015757
>>62015752
Do you live in Miraflores, or Villa Maria del Triunfo? Those are the only places I've seen bicycle paths in Peru.

62015759
>>62015757
Villa El Salvador

62015763
>>62015759
Ah yes, those were financed by Germany, I saw it on the page of our embassy in Lima when they were built. I hope our ambassador gets replaced soon, she's on a permanent holiday visiting all the nice places of Peru on our tax money.

62015765
>>62015763
So you are german? Nice, thank you very much and please don't replace her.

62015769
>>62015756
You are me.
I have bought and old house and renovated it totally on my own over the course of 5 years.
Saved probably 200k.
>>62015674
I cheat. I have an ebike. This is hill country here and i am very tired after work. 8km 250 m climb.

Additionally:
10 chickens. Eat table scraps lay 3-4 eggs a day feed is 20 bucks a month in winter.
We cook a lot with the instant pot. Throw the stuff in the instant pot at 10 pm or whenever you have the time, set timer. Finished meal at 1pm. or 2pm whatever it keeps it hot.
Also I have planted a ton of fruit trees and berries, of which I am now starting the reap the rewards. Jostaberry/Greengage/ quince are my best successes in zone 7b.

62015820
>>62015759
VES mentioned
holy based

62015903
>>62015674
>I commute to work 2km
Why even bike? The fuck?

62015995
Euro here, live in the capital of my country. Only ever driven my parents cars who live in a small town. In the capital i’ve never needed a car and i have never missed anything because of it. 72€ a month and i have unlimited transportation to anywhere in the metropolital region. My car owning friend says i’ve saved 10s of thousands of euros.

62016105
>>62015995
It's true. I spend 400€ on Diesel+Insurance for my car a month (~70km a day) Add 200€ for intitial Price + Maintenance. So 600€ to drive a shitbox to a place i hate and do stuff i loathe for net 2500€ a month. I'm a NEET now, because it's fucking stupid to live the wagie-life in this dupsterfire

62016150
>>62015995
And how much You spend on rent? Or do You live in Your own? I have my own house in rural hilly part of my country, commute 30km/day by car and insurance included I am like 100€/month. It still comes cheaper than renting in capital.

62016198
>>62016150
The ”city tax” at my city is like 1,5% lower than in my small hometown, i’m a high earner so that taken into account the rent really isn’t that high considering all the amenities i get from the big city.

62016236
Imagine being so poor that you “save money” by restricting your ability to travel to a few miles while being exposed to the elements. Sure seems peasant coded


I enjoy seeing bikers dealing with rain in freezing temperatures while I casually drive by in my heated leather seats listening to music on my surround sound system. Maybe today I will take a casual hundred mile drive just to go see some sites, can’t imagine having to deal with shitty slow public transit just to do something so basic, but bikers have no choice.

62016298
>>62015724
Holy shit, are you Bizzaro America?
Left....being good?
Right....retards?

62016368
>>62016236
There is also the moral question. Public transport simply releases a lot less carbon emissions compared to driving your own car

62016384
>>62016236
I see it from another perspective: Cycling keeps me fit, exposure to weather keeps you healthy and resilient. We're going to need a lot of strength where we're headed

62016397
>>62015674
car and rent are the biggest money pits. try to avoid them. no car, live with parents (if possible), not eating out, no retarded vacations

62016860
>>62016397
>live like a poor person and never experience life just to save money

Man it’s like biz is filled with people who can’t
Make more money, it’s far more effective to just make more money than try to save nickels and dimes by hiding in a basement and never doing anything

62016865
>>62016860
consoooming = living
yeah you cant make this shit up

62016878
>>62015674
How do you manage the sweating? Pedaling a bicycle requires a significant amount of effort. Don't people in Europe care about getting sweaty before going to places?
t. thin faggot who can't walk two block without getting his armpits sweaty, sex is out of the question for me, fugg

62016899
>>62016860
You can do everything in a big city in europe with just public transport. Plus you'll get that bonus feeling from knowing you live morally righteous, taxing the ecology less. There's no reason to waste money when you can easily save a lot of it. And honestly, fuck dealing with trafic, it's much less stressful just using modern high quality public transport.

62016906
>>62016878
Europe is colder. Except southern europe, don't know how they live.

62016913
>>62016878
pedalling a bicycle at commuter pace requires next to no effort
before you start with "what about hills"
my commute has 200m of hills in 10 km and I would need to have two broken legs to struggle with it

62016939
>>62016236
The automobile industry will teach you to take pride in your weakness, sell you your cage, and convince you it is freedom.

62016973
>>62016913
>only 200m of hills in a 10 km trip
Where do you live, anon? Pride Lands? I find that hard to believe, even cities have uneven terrain. I bet you euros sweat a lot but you all collectively pretend nothing is happening and/or use perfume/cologne to conceal the BO

62017114
>>62016939
Kek you just described the american spirit.

62017140
>>62015674
Same. Never driven a car, I've been working for 20 years and I'm 40 so I've saved a fuck-ton. Remember going to month long trips to the tropics in my 20's when all my friends were dirt-poor students.

62017176
>>62015679
How does sucking dick save you money anon? Elaborate please.

62017183
>>62016236
You are fat. We get it.

62017352
All the cyclists in here need to go back to /lgbt/

item.title: DONT LOOK AT THE FUTURES — 5 replies — 20.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
DONT LOOK AT THE FUTURES

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-03-22 22:26 UTC

OP

RUN
RUN FOR YOUR LIVES

Early replies (first 3)

62017537
>Don't look at the closed markets!
Okay, idiot.

62017584
>>62017529

62017594
>>62017537
Are you trolling or stupid I can't tell

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62017634
>>62017529
I'm gonna slurp!

62017815
>>62017529
Why didn't Denethor just bring in skilled engineers and doctors from Harad?

item.title: OIL TO $150 — 53 replies — 19.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
OIL TO $150

Open thread • Replies: 53 • Updated: 2026-03-22 19:48 UTC

OP

Oil is at $98

This is the cheapest its going to get. If you're thinking of going long on oil, this is your signal. Once we liberate the Iranian power plants, every powerplant, refinery, and desalination plant is going to get blown to hell. World oil supply will be reduced for the next decade at least.

This is your only warning.

https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/posts/116269822349947644

Early replies (first 3)

62014848
>>62014841
Anon, your oil long is fucked. You should have sold at the initial spike of 125. It will never get higher than that. You missed the bus and have brought shame upon your village.

62014902
>>62014841
Hey buddy, why dont you look at futures for WTI. Notice a pattern? Why do you think its bouncing off 100 anon? What's Brent doing anon?

62014906
>>62014841
Oil to 200, then 150 is next bottom

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62015215
>>62014841
All he does is brinksmanship negotiation. It sometimes works, and this just looks like a hail mary attempt at it. He won't do shit and everyone will have forgotten the tweet on Monday. He's looking for an off ramp.

62015265
>>62015133
Based, pico-bottom soon brothers

62015282
>>62014954
That's not a fair depiction of the dump.
Picrel is this past week. That drop at the end was the breaking news.

62015283
Thank god my IBIT iron condor will hit. Get smoked. Retards.

62015361
>>62015282
Bigger dumps incoming.

62015433
>>62014841
Aaaah the usual weekend snp protective crypto destroying goylem tweet..... GIVE ME SUB1500ETH NIGGERS OR. DIE!

62015443
>>62015106
He is the anti-crypto president

62015456
>>62014954
What in the world is a "bit" coin?

62015509
>>62014841
Oil is at 110. And your schizo doomer scenario wont be real as always

62015534
>>62014841
>lets create one of the biggest humanitarian catastrophes in human history, surely that will do the trick!
Is it his original idea, or did Bibi come up with this one? It's simultaneously extremely malicious and extremely retarded so could be both.

62015806
fifa certified him, he's doing everything for peace

62015813
>>62014987
I thought Trump did a perfect attack last year that completely destroyed Iran's nuclear program. Was the big man wrong?

62015826
>>62014902
>What's Brent doing anon?
Grinding up almost every single day for the last few weeks?

62015828
>>62015534
>it’s le Drump’s fault Iran is launching drones into Dubai apartment buildings
Your new leader’s gay and disfigured lol

62015831
>>62015813
You see, it's a Schrödinger's nuclear program, it's both destroyed and two weeks away from producing nukes at the same time

62016035
>>62014987
Fuck off tranny, we DESTROYED their nuclear capability in 2025, trump literally confirmed and tweeted it, anyone not agreeing is a tranny

62016045
>>62015098
>If he does x bad thing you would still be supporting him
Seething more, brown nigger.

62016048
>>62014841
Screenshot this: Trump already has a deal to open the streight. He's just pretending to be a big tough guy in order to save face and gain a "win".

62016624
>>62014987
This kind of escalation and coercion by atrocity seems like the single greatest thing you could do if you wanted to motivate Iran to obtain nukes

62016636
>>62015828
The US/Israel started that practice. They bomb buildings in Iran if they suspect an individual they want to target lives in it. So it's not surprising that Iran then also bombs apartments that they suspect US personnel they want to target live in it

62016781
>>62014841
im literally running a TWAP long right now

62016793
>>62014841
Attacking civilian power infrastructure is a war crime.

62016838
>>62014848
Trump is indirectly admitting that the US military cannot open the strait

62016858
>>62016793
Do you think power plants and hydro electric dams were attacked during WW2?
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Operation_Chastise

62016905
if trump simply said nothing, pulled back from doing shit in Iran things would slowly, over months, go back to "normal." prices would be higher, but there would be so much instability.

But the ""genius"" Trump just can't shut the fuck up as usual. He and all his buddies are completely insulated from anything bad happening in the markets anyways. Congratulations to all the retards that got tricked into supporting this guy, despite decades of evidence that he is an actual retard.

62016908
>>62014987
Iran has been "two weeks away" from a nuke for decades you dumb cunt.

62017059
This retarded war will drag on for months

62017062
>>62014841
top is in for oil. these posts are the signal.
short on monday

62017131
>>62017062
Do it and post results

62017142
>>62014841
if that happens the global oil market is not going to remain global

item.title: I've locked myself out of $900 and I need your help. — 31 replies — 15.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
I've locked myself out of $900 and I need your help.

Open thread • Replies: 31 • Updated: 2026-03-22 20:30 UTC

OP

I've locked myself out of $900 and I need your help.

I use this exchange MEXC often as a simple middleman whenever I accept crypto from people in real life. So instead of giving you my address, I give people the address from the exchange and when I withdraw to my personal wallet it comes out of a different wallet so the people I interact with don't see all my tokens, activity, etc. Today I tried this shit and MEXC says I need to confirm my identity. If this was less than $100 I would just forget it but this is $900 so I thought ok fine I will do it. The problem is that they don't accept users from the USA so I was using a VPN and now they want to verify my ID from one of the countries that they accept users from. What do I do? Please I'm not going to be homeless from this but it really hurts to know that I just burned $900 dollars.

Early replies (first 3)

62014397
>>62014384
>I just burned $900

62014403
>>62014384

62014419
Come on is nobody really going to give me some kind of advice? I feel kind of depressed from this.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62014448
>>62014419
Give it back Jamal

62014453
This is not the right basket weaving forum for you if losing 900 Dollars depresses you.

62014462
>>62014384
Do you know somebody in a country from where Mexc accept users that you can trust?
If not, you are never goint to get that money back.
You should not fuck around with the laws when putting cash in one of these iffy exchanges.
Why didnt you use a Us based exchange? Or a metamask wallet?

62014478
>>62014384
be glad its only 900
try to be more careful next time

62014483
>>62014462
most likely because what he's doing is illegal

62014577
>>62014384
That's the MEXC gamble. It works fine on VPN until one day for no apparent reason it'll press you about confirming your identity and then you're fucked. I lost more than that on top of what I lost being a retard using leverage. I take it as a blessing considering had I not been banned, I probably would have added more margin and still have open positions currently as the market crabs. Fuck that site.

62014644
It's a shame we let these govs and companies ever get away with this ID verification shit to this point, isn't it?

62014783
>>62014644
Spain just required all citizens to report everty bit of property they have outside the country. (Land, stocks, cash, crypto,..)

62015121
>>62014462
>>62014483
I'm not doing anything illegal. I already told you the truth. I was using this exchange's wallets as a middle point so that people couldn't track my personal wallet. I bought $900 from a friend today and I gave him this CEX wallet without realizing that MEXC had changed their policies sometime in 2025. The reason I was using MEXC is because they don't require KYC and still let you withdraw like 1 whole bitcoin.

62015137
>>62014384
Stop being a fucking retard, I had the same shit happen to me. You write support email stating that all purchases were made on vacation in Mexico and if they don't let you withdraw you will get your lawyer involved. Its been a long time but mexc doesn't have any rules on people transferring crypto only buying and selling is prohibited for US citizens. Confirm your identity drop and write them that email and they will let you withdraw

62015140
>>62014384
How many times must we say it? Not your keys, not your coins.

62015141
>>62015137
What I meant is that buying crypto is illegal in the USA but not illegal for Americans on mexc so you can be American and buy crypto in Mexico on MEXC
Apologies I'm high as fuck but this worked for me

62015160
>>62015121
monero solves this

62015162
>>62015160
buy an ad.

62015175
>click on a perp dex to see what it's about
>get this message
I'm actually offended, I haven't tried to access shit. Little bitches.

62015216
>>62014384
Didn't you say your friend from another country was the person using it and you you were mistaken that it was you and you submitted his information to help him because he has a hard time with technology, and that he owes you 100% of the crypto in the wallet and is going to send it to your new master wallet as soon as it is unlocked for him by this exchange? I could've swore this was implied earlier?

62015253
>>62014384
Fellow burger here. I had this happen with $47k after rapidly depositing and swapping to xmr and trying to withdraw. I was being hugely retarded but I wasn't aware of better options for xmr at the time and I was fomoing into a parabolic move. They locked the account and it seemed like a hassle so I left the 47k usdt I hadnt yet withdrawn sitting there for 6 months or so. Finally I got around to going through kyc kabuki with them a few weeks ago. It was, as expected, drawn-out and humiliating but at the end they unlocked my acc and I withdrew with no further problems. So just email support, explain you're a burger who didn't know better and go through kyc via email with them. You'll have to live with the spectre of not knowing if theyve sold your kyc data to the darkweb but that's the price you have to pay, unfortunately.

62015297
>>62014462
>>62015141
>>62015216
>>62015253
Thanks to everybody for your advice. I will try to find someone from another country but if I can't then I guess I will email them and tell them I am from America. But won't they freeze my money since I've already made a few trades in the past? I have actually used their exchange in the past to make a few trades, but I very rarely trade on it.

62015310
>>62015297
I made trades into xmr and had several successful withdrawals to my xmr wallet before they froze my acct. They still unfroze me just fine after kabuki theatre had concluded. It probably helped that all my funds originated from a solana wallet I owbed with a ton of obvious shitcoin gains, so the source of my funds was relatively clear and straightforward. If you're getting random deposits from multiple addresses not under your control that might make your situation a lot murkier. Part of my humiliation ritual involved me filming a video of me showing that I controlled the wallet the funds originated from.

62015474
>>62015310
I don't own the wallet that sent the funds to MEXC. My friend owns the wallet and I gave him $900 so he would send the eth to me.

62015875
>>62015310
They let you use the account afterwards or just to withdraw?

62016008
>>62014384
It's bad if multiple wallets send coins to your exchange wallet because they can send funds from blacklisted wallets and the exchange could request proof of origin.
You should continue posting your issue here and on other communities. Proof your innocence. Be cooperative but if they drag it out, threaten endless FUD and complaints.

MEXC is kind of dirty and states KYC is optional but they freeze accounts randomly and then force KYC. This is called shotgun KYC.
Apparently they have recently made it mandatory without informing their users about this change.
The chances of your KYC data getting sold or leaked in the future are high. Already happened to T1 CEXs.

Before you use the identity of someone else, know that they could request more documents like bank statements or more videos.

>>62015253
There was a riot against MEXC on Twitter some months ago, maybe the have only let you withdraw because the pressure was too high?

62016019
>>62014384
Exchanges aren't stupid. They scan all your Android apps.
VPN apps and no KYC.
Bingo! We'll just scam this user selectively.

Anyway, your story is a load of bullshit. If you're in the US, you can easily get the same wallet address on Coinbase as on MEXC.
You're doing this to evade taxes.
At least be honest about it.

62016111
>>62015875
Only to withdraw.

62016598
>>62016008
No bank account was ever used so if I find someone from overseas they should have all the information required, even if MEXC demands video.
>>62016019
I never used my phone, only my desktop with a vpn. Why are you so certain I was doing illegal things? I am trying to evade taxes on $900? Do you hear yourself? As I've stated before, the truth is that I was using it because it is a buffer between me and whoever I give my address to, and the main reason I don't use Coinbase is because MEXC doesn't require KYC. Why would I give my ID to companies that will probably leak it eventually if I don't have to? It's literally just one extra step that I don't need to concern myself with. Also years ago I was trying to fomo in to something and I bought ETH on Coinbase and when I tried to withdraw it said I needed to wait a full 7 days. I don't know if this has changed since, but that was the last time I ever used Coinbase.

62016605
>>62014384
>he fell for the MEXC scam

62017262
get an rns id, i think the cheapest one is $300

use rns id to kyc at mexc

basically like getting $600 back which is better than nothing. or take your chances with mexc support

62017298
>>62014384
thanks for playing kiddo

item.title: >LOAN FORGIVENESS FOR ME BUT NOT FOR YOU this generation will be the most broke in history. — 36 replies — 12.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
>LOAN FORGIVENESS FOR ME BUT NOT FOR YOU this generation will be the most broke in history.

Open thread • Replies: 36 • Updated: 2026-03-22 19:36 UTC

OP

>LOAN FORGIVENESS FOR ME BUT NOT FOR YOU
this generation will be the most broke in history.
who will buy your stocks and crypto now?

Early replies (first 3)

62013196
loans wouldn't be a problem if interest was paid after the principle

literally all loan-related problems are from people upset they've payed $40k and only $4k of that went towards the principle

62013204
>>62013196
How about instead we tell the dumb niggers that get mad at this that the interest is paying astronauts to build a wall in space to protect them from aliens?

62013206
>>62013196
How about we just ban usury (again?)

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62013328
>>62012736
>Nooo I took out a loan and signed my name on the contract and everything why am I being expected to honor the contract that's not faaaaaiiiiir
You did it to yourselves. Now grow the fuck up and pay it back.

62013334
>>62013237
The high IQ move would have been to convince the university to give you enough scholarships and fellowships that there was nothing left for you pay.

62013341
>>62013334
it's state dependent. i graduated with a state university (in pennsylvania) with a 3.8 GPA in applied math. never once received a dime of scholarship aid.

62013359
>>62013196
Huh? Extra payments each month should be applied to your principal amount. Mathematically, paying an extra couple hundred here and there actually make a big difference over the life of a loan. As far as total interest goes, anyway.
If your bank is not applying extra money towards principal, you're getting super-jewed. Like, that's a whole other level of usury lol.

62013368
>>62013341
>it's state dependent.
Nope. It's very IQ dependent though. You get offered those scholarships and fellowships in high school. By the time you actually show up to university it's too late, you're already enrolled and paying your own way and they have nothing to gain by throwing money at you. They're an enticement for high IQ prospects, not a reward for studying hard.

62013372
>>62012736
Car salesman here

It won’t matter. Retards will always find a way.
You can try to talk them down to more reasonable purchase (doesn’t matter to me, in fact the cheaper the vehicle usually the better the profit excepting the absolute max platinum super high rollers package).

They won’t hear of it.
They want their AC seats and they will go 20% interest rolling 15k to do it, and they will do it with you or find someone else.

62013377
>>62013359
He's saying he wants all of each payment to go towards the principle. Which he can totally do, but that has to be written into the loan agreement. It's his failure, but that won't stop him from whining about how "unfair" it is that the contract he read and signed is now suddenly not to his particular preferences, rather than simply paying down the principle at an accelerated rate by paying more than the absolute minimum each month Because whining is free and easy and doesn't involve difficult things like adulting.

62013510
>>62013377
Yeah let me just call up the Department of Education and negotiate a unique loan agreement. Some people don't have any good options. Doesn't mean we should let international bankers prey on them.

62013544
>>62013368
no, it's literally dependent on how your state funds public schools. florida, for example, has a very generous and easy to get "bright stars" scholarship. pennsylvania has no such program and comparatively expensive state schools, because they chose to underfund colleges.

what's the deal with kinky haired muttalo zoomers running off their big ugly gorilla lips when they haven't the slightest idea?

62013583
>>62013196
This. Usury has killed mankind. We live in a parasite state and world

62013593
>>62013196
Loans wouldn't be a problem if people didn't take out loans with larger monthly payments than they could afford to pay.
The problem is not the system, the problem is people's financial literacy.
Or lack thereof.

62013624
>>62013593
>Loans wouldn't be a problem if people didn't take out loans with larger monthly payments than they could afford to pay.

this argument is meaningless when you look at how quickly certain fields of study can be "disrupted." software development was almost a sure bet if you weren't retarded. within 5 years it was destroyed by a combination of outsourced indians, AI, corporations funding bootcamps, and the media attracting students. similar things have happened in law, accounting, and pharmacy. similar things are in the works for certain areas of medicine and dentistry.

62013630
>>62013206
Economy slows down without usury.
>heh GOOD
Yeah except all other countries won't be slowed down and your retarded ass country will be lapped and left behind in no time. And then probably raped and conquered and erased from history. It's a doggy dog world

62013635
>>62012736
i don't understand the op pic. is there a point in this screenshot? explain please

62013677
>>62013328
The f35 Iran is blowing up costs 200 billion dollars

62013683
>>62013196
That’s the risk premium of borrowing because too many retards default on their loans.

You’re more than welcome to lend out your own money at a lower interest rate. See how long it takes before you go bankrupt

62013690
>>62013683
They can't default on student loans

62013712
>>62013196
>>62012736
Fafsa loans shouldn'thave interest....
Why do people not understand that ALL FEDERLA FUNDING COMES FROM TAXPAYERS

If you are paying a loan and paying taxes you are being taxed twice. All loans should be either tax write offs or credits lmao. The audacity of a country to create such a fucking up education system, then outsource/insource H1bs to jobs, then say "sorry goy, you gotta be taxed twice".

No one would care about repayment if the system simply acknowledged double taxation is illegal and I will go tea party on your asses if it isn't fixed.

62013713
>>62013208
exterminate lolbergs and trannies, they're 1%~ of the population, then fix the system without freaks and pedos.

>>62013368
t. has a low iq

62014526
>>62013677
oh no guess we're gonna have to close at least 40 Somalian Quality Learing Centers to cover the cost.

62014544
>>62012736
>making up a fake screenshot

62014550
>>62012736
> affordable housing
> good, stable and full time jobs
> government assistance to buy a home
all things we will never see again. a generation took all these things and then pulled up the ladder.

62014584
>>62013206
Quotes and rules about "usury" from ancient sources are irrelevant today because back then there were 0 regulations and every other loan taker repaid by selling one of his children (or himself) into slavery.

62014585
Half of americans make less than 60k a year.

62014832
>>62014584
Your entire nation has been sold into slavery because of usury.

62015505
>>62013510
It's an unsecured loan retard why the fuck would you be getting favorable terms anyways, don't like it don't take the money

62015824
>>62013206
My guy

62016044
>>62015505
>It's an unsecured loan
meaningless observation because it's also basically impossible to discharge in bankruptcy.

62017026
>>62013229
If the interest doesn't capitalize then once you pay the principle off the interest stops growing and you wouldn't get the retardation where the loan is growing every year faster than you can pay it off.

62017097
>>62012736
if we siezed the means of money production and stopped paying mortgages, this demonic prison would fail in weeks

item.title: Ambition or WFH stagnation? — 12 replies — 8.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Ambition or WFH stagnation?

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-03-22 21:07 UTC

OP

>in mid 30s
>have a boring as fuck work from home job for a few years
>save £1k per month plus a lot of pension
>given menial responsibilities relative to my position's grade
>workload moves slowly and have barely achieved anything
>career stagnating
>have the chance to get a similar but slightly better job in London
>would live in tiny apartment and travel to work 2-3 times a week and save very little money
>could finally start getting experience necessary for promotion or higher paid jobs

I have been agonising about this for months. I recently entered six figure net worth purgatory. So if I stayed in my current job for two more years nothing would fundamentally change about my financial status and I'd be totally stagnant career wise.

But renting is a humiliation ritual.

Early replies (first 3)

62013718
Stop posting this thread every month for starters.

62013739
Why would you ever give up WFH? Its literally the only improvement to society that has benefited wagies in a hundred years.

62013744
>>62013739
This.
OP is a fucking retard
More free time + more savings and he wants to give it up to live in fucking London

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62013748
Why do you keep reposting this thread about your 100k pounds a year wfh london job? Faggot.

62013752
>>62013739
Because he has the potential to break out of low level cagie hell and earn enough to afford FIRE, or even maybe potentially a family (reaching here, but a man can dream).

62013753
>>62013718
fpbp why does he keep responting the same shit.

62013773
>>62013752
The job he'd be leaving for wouldn't net him that much money, he needs it for the experience of MAYBE getting another high paying job in 5 years. Growing your "career" is a relic of boomer times, what kind of retard still believes in it besides a retard that keeps posting this thread?

62013790
>>62013773
Look, it's SOME kind of plan. It's better than just sitting there drooling. His WFH sounds like a dead end.

62013929
>>62013717
>but slightly better job
>slightly
Tells you all.

62016376
>>62013717
>taking risks in this clown market
>for a low reward if even that
Stay wherever you are. If you feel stagnant, do a degree or courses on the side.
I turned down FAGMAN interviews to stay in my comfy job. The few extra bucks are not worth the risk and the stress.

62016381
>>62013717
$50Crypto!

62017417
>>62013739
WFH from my experience loves to dick you on your schedule because they know you have beem given convenience(done by cutting hours,mandatory OT and scheduling breaks way too early or late. They are also much harder about returning to break on time and will state there isnt a grace period) and aim to be as understaffed as possible so that those who are hired have a neverending stack of qued up work.

Theres also the issue of how your body reacts to it as well and you probably have to start hitting the gym to not blob out. Very often just digging fuckin holes or staring ugly fuckers in their face is less stressful than WFH
